title: prunus × lannesiana f. caudata
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. caudata, also known as Chinese plum or Chinese cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throat, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have anti-aging and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and flowers of the Prunus × lannesiana f. caudata plant are commonly used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
